channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Parents Step In to Educate Children as Dulcie September Primary Remains Closed
item.description: At Dulcie September Primary School in Rabie Ridge, teaching has come to a halt for over a month due to deteriorating infrastructure. Parents have pulled their children from the school, citing unsafe c...

item.title: Kenya suspends public transport strike for a week amid fuel price talks
item.description: Kenya government announced that the public transport strike, triggered by rising fuel prices due to the Iran war, will be suspended for one week. The strike began on Monday, causing major disruption t...

item.title: USDA’s New SNAP Store Requirements May Limit Access for Low-Income Shoppers
item.description: Starting November 4, 2026, retailers accepting SNAP benefits must meet stricter requirements, including offering at least seven items in four staple food categories—dairy, produce, grains, and protein...

item.title: Australian government halts funding for 13 research projects citing national security
item.description: Last week, the Australian Research Council announced that the federal education minister, Jason Clare, blocked funding for 13 research projects due to concerns around national security, defence, or in...

item.title: BleachBit Introduces a Text-Based User Interface for Linux and Windows
item.description: BleachBit, a widely used open-source system cleaner for Linux and Windows, has introduced a text-based user interface (TUI) that is currently in alpha. The new TUI allows users to clean systems using ...

item.title: Comelec processes over 5.4 million voter applications in nationwide registration drive
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) reported that it has processed a total of 5,470,889 voter applications nationwide following a seven-month registration drive. The initiative, aimed at preparing f...

item.title: Super Eagles Coach Praised for Scouting Local NPFL Talents
item.description: Chief Christopher Okonkwo, a well-respected football pundit, don give kudos to Super Eagles coach Eric Chelle for him waka around Nigeria Professional Football League (NPFL) matches dey watch local pl...

item.title: Pakistan Security Forces Conduct Operation, Neutralise 22 Terrorists in North Waziristan
item.description: According to a statement issued by the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR) on Tuesday, Pakistan’s security forces successfully killed 22 terrorists in North Waziristan’s Shewa area. The operation, ...

item.title: Gachagua Alleges Itumbi Oversees Government Operations During Ruto’s Trips Abroad
item.description: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua has stirred political debate after claiming that Dennis Itumbi, Head of Presidential Special Projects and Creative Economy Coordination, effectively runs gover...

item.title: State Prosecutor Suspended After Case Against Taxi Boss Sibanyoni is Struck Off
item.description: In a notable development at the Kwaggafontein Magistrates' Court, the extortion and money laundering case against taxi boss Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni and his co-accused has been struck off the court rol...

item.title: Trump complains about lack of coverage from Fox News and Newsmax on his health care announcement
item.description: President Donald Trump expressed frustration Tuesday morning while inspecting construction at his East Wing project. He complained that his major health care announcement from the previous day receive...

item.title: Gowon Reveals How Nigeria Got Arms from Soviet Union During Civil War
item.description: Former Head of State, Yakubu Gowon, don talk say when US and UK no gree supply weapons during Nigeria civil war, e force am to turn to Soviet Union and one Lebanese businessman, Ali Jamal, for help. F...

item.title: Opera Australia nears break-even after financial restructuring and successful musical seasons
item.description: Opera Australia has successfully turned around its finances, moving from a $10 million deficit to almost breaking even at the operating level in 2025. The company's 2025 annual report reveals a 30 per...

item.title: Sandra Onyenucheya accuses Frank Edoho of infidelity and abuse amid ongoing divorce
item.description: The ongoing drama between popular Nigerian TV host Frank Edoho and his estranged wife, Sandra Onyenucheya, has escalated. Sandra, who is the CEO of Vivabella Designs, has publicly defended herself aft...

item.title: Stephen Colbert to Host Farewell Celebration Following Final Late Show Episode
item.description: Stephen Colbert is set to present his final episode of the Late Show on Thursday, concluding the long-running CBS programme that began in 1993 with David Letterman. After the final taping, Colbert has...

item.title: Uganda’s Outgoing Speaker Anita Among Investigated for Alleged Corruption and Luxury Asset Seizures
item.description: Uganda’s outgoing Speaker of Parliament, Anita Annet Among, is currently facing serious investigations over alleged corruption and money laundering. Security forces, including the Criminal Investigati...

item.title: Transport Stakeholder Kennedy Kaunda Clarifies Confrontation with CS Wandayi over Fuel Prices
item.description: Kennedy Kaunda, a well-known transport sector stakeholder and CEO of the East Africa Tour Guides and Drivers Association (EATGDA), has finally spoken out about his interruption of Energy Cabinet Secre...

item.title: Shettima Denies Allegation of Plotting Against President Tinubu
item.description: Vice-President Kashim Shettima don yan say some people try to create wahala between am and President Bola Tinubu few months after dem start office. E talk say na people from Borno State wey no wan mak...

item.title: addlink Presents 2026 Virtual Showcase Featuring Advanced Storage and Memory Solutions
item.description: Addlink Technology Corp. has launched its 2026 Virtual Showcase, offering an online preview of its latest storage and memory products designed for AI PCs, gaming systems, content creators, and general...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Highlights Ongoing Operation Ghazab lil-Haq and Armed Forces’ Commitment to National Security
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif visited the Command and Staff College in Quetta on Tuesday, lauding the professionalism, operational preparedness, and sacrifices of the Pakistan Armed Forces. During his...
